reviews.review_title: Simple idea but really good game!
reviews.review_description:
This game is really fun and has exceeded my expectations! I bought it half expecting that I'd be asking for a refund (maybe because it's so cheap I expected it to be low quality) but actually it's an excellent game that I'll be keeping and playing lots more. It's such a simple concept, guide the hoop along a tube and past obstacles - but there's plenty of creativity so that it stays fun to play and gets increasingly challenging. This sort of game works so well in mixed reality, I'm impressed and happy with it!

Tip - on my Quest 3 I've found using the trigger button to hold the ring works better than the grip button. The grip button sometimes lets go for some reason.
Suggestions - let players see their high score (and best time) for each individual level, rather than just seeing a running overall total. This way there's more incentive to replay levels. There could also be a scoreboard to see other players best scores/times.

EDIT - Now the grip button has been fixed and there are leader boards!

The circle is very special and cute, and the operation is very simple but not easy to pass.      If there is a cooperative mode, I will recommend all my friends to buy it.    This game is sure to be a great addition to a fun party.
A good game that everyone should pay attention.

developer_response.body: Hey there! Thank you for your positive review and really glad you like our cute characters! Yes, there is a multiplayer mode coming up and do stay tuned to it! I am sure the party mode would be really fun!

reviews.review_description: This is really awesome. It is fresh, challenging and has lots of stages.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the nice review, I'm so glad you enjoyed it!

reviews.review_description:
An Amazing NEW Mixed Reality Game is here and I decided it would be even more fun to play it on a Hoverboard!

Search Lipnox VR on YouTube to see the video I made on the game

developer_response.body: Hey Lipnox, thanks again for this wonderful review and I'll be sure to get your hat up by the next release! Cheers!

reviews.review_description: This game is really freaking cool! At first you would think it might not be because its so simple looking but trust me this is a hidden gem. You have to move a ring around multiple pipes and obstacles as you try to  hit the sides of anything or you will loose health. I didnt realize it at first but the more i played it the more i realized its kinda like super mario! There are a ton of levels to get through with several different difficulties that make the game a real challenge. There is even a world leaderboard to try and beat your friends scores which makes it that much more fun and adds replay value to the game. 100% worth downloading and checking out. I love the nice calming music as you make your way through the puzzles. The game truly wants you to get better and better and faster and faster. Love it and its a great use of mixed reality!

developer_response.body: Hey! I know it's another thank you message from me for your other video feature but I really appreciate this wonderful review and glad you enjoyed it. It really motivates me to work harder!

reviews.review_description:
The concept is extremely simple: drive a ring around a track without touching it. The old amusement park game expanded and turned into an MR experience. The graphics and the sounds are spot on, they make it look playful and charming. The game can be extremely challenging in hard mode but you can set it to easy and enjoy the ride!

A few things could be polished:
- make the loading screen transparent
- remove the "sticky" behaviour of the ring at the start of the motion (I hate it)
- make the buttons of the controller be shortcuts for resetting the stage or moving to the previous stage

developer_response.body:
Hey!

Thank you so much for your positive review and feedback, it really motivates me to work harder and I'm happy that you've enjoyed it so far. 

Your ideas and suggestions are great! I've also been trying to solve the sticky effect for a while. 

In the meantime, do join my little discord room from the page link or here: https://discord.gg/vsWauhD4zF if you do have more feedback and we can also chat there! 

See you and thanks!!

reviews.review_description:
Wow, wow and triple wow!
Beautifully presented, charming. That' s enough about me!.

Thankyou and hope it is a deserved success.

developer_response.body: Hey there! Thank you for playing my game and I am so glad you enjoyed it, do join my discord channel https://discord.gg/vsWauhD4zF if you haven't, would love to hear your ideas there :)

reviews.review_title: Hooked on Holes: A Captivating Puzzler
reviews.review_description:
Rescue the Holes delivers exactly what it promises—a straightforward "get the ring from start to finish" puzzle with decent graphics. However, don't let its simplicity fool you; the gameplay is where this game truly shines. With three different difficulty levels, I found myself irresistibly drawn into its world, compelled to see each level through to the end.

The game's addictive nature cannot be overstated. It has that elusive "just one more try" hook that keeps you coming back for more. The developers have mentioned that they hope to release additional puzzles, and if they do, I’ll be among the first to dive back in.

One of the standout features is the mixed reality integration. Navigating the puzzles in a 3D space adds a whole new layer of immersion, as you walk around and find the best angles to solve each puzzle. This feature elevates the game from a simple puzzle to an engaging, interactive experience.

For puzzle enthusiasts, Rescue the Holes is absolutely worth the price. Its blend of challenging gameplay and innovative mixed reality elements make it a must-try. Don’t hesitate—give this one a go!

developer_response.body:
Hey there! 

Thank you for your positive review and really happy that you enjoyed it! Look forward to bringing more innovative and challenging levels, in the mean time do join my new discord channel from our website rescuetheholes.com to share any ideas!

reviews.review_title: This game is a shining pearl
reviews.review_description: Easy to play, but the design is not simple, a rare good game

developer_response.body:
Hey there,

Thank you so much for your positive review! I am still working to improve it and adding more levels! 

I would love for you to join my new discord room to get some feedback, you can find the link at RescueTheHoles.com or via this link: https://discord.gg/vsWauhD4zF

See you!

reviews.review_description:
Gotta thank Shoes for recommending this one to me. Really simple concept made into a full fledged vr experience… I love games that can only be played in VR, and this is one those.  It’s incredibly challenging but it never feels cheap.  Every mistake made is 100% my fault, and not the fault of bugs or bad design/controls. Get this while it’s so cheap! Knowing what I know now, I’d have paid $15-$20, especially since the game is constantly being updated with fixes/extra content. The developer is incredibly nice and easy to speak with, and loves constructive criticism. I suggest joining the games discord if you wanna stay up to date with the constant updates.  

Keep up the great work. Looking forward to seeing what else you have planned.

developer_response.body: Hey there! Thanks for the kind and positive review, it motivates me to continue working hard on this game, and I thank and appreciate all of you for your early feedback! There's still more to come and I'm excited about it, wish I could go faster as I'm just a solo developer!
Thank you for your nice review! Glad you enjoyed it! :)

reviews.review_description:
This game is a great VR throwback to that arcade maze where you have to guide that metal rod from one end to the other, without touching the path. 

Only a a few hard levels in, but it's definitely entertaining and worth the price. 

I haven't looked around the menu much, but if it's not there, this would be a great game where building your own levels would fit well. Also, being able to share and download puzzles created by others. 

With all the stars we can earn, I think a "store" to spend them would also be a good idea. We could unlock things to customize our characters - and if the create our own levels becomes reality - quirky and interesting obstacles for our courses could also be unlocked. 

I look forward to what comes next.

developer_response.body: Hi! Thanks for your wonderful review and I'm so happy you enjoyed it! Thank you for your ideas as well, the level maker is in development, and certainly it will be something I look forward to, seeing the creative work from all the players!
